content:
It looks like there was an issue with the age you provided. The age of 10 is not valid for opening a bank account in India or Japan. Please enter an age that is at least 18 years old to proceed. Thank you!

What is your full name?
Great to meet you, Adithyan! Can you please tell me your age?
Great to meet you, Adithyan! Can you please tell me your age?
Great! I've auto-filled your country as China, state as Guangdong, and district as Shenzhen. Now, could you please provide your email address?

It looks like there was an issue with the age you provided. The minimum age required to open a bank account is 16. Please choose an age that is 16 or older, and I'll be happy to help you update your form!

Could you please provide your email address?

It looks like there was an issue when trying to change your country to India. The state you provided, Guangdong, does not belong to India. To fix this, you can either choose a different state that belongs to India or keep your current country as China. Please let me know how you would like to proceed!

Could you please provide your email address?
Could you please provide your email address?
What type of account would you like to open? You can choose from Savings, Current, or Fixed Deposit.
Could you please set a password for your account? It should be at least 6 characters long, with one uppercase letter and one special symbol.

Hello! It looks like the password you provided, "Adhioha," doesn't meet the required criteria. To successfully create your bank account, please make sure your password has at least 6 characters, includes at least one uppercase letter, and contains at least one special symbol (like @, #, $, etc.). 

Once you update your password to meet these requirements, we can proceed with your application. Thank you!

Could you please set a password for your account? It should be at least 6 characters long, include one uppercase letter, and have one special symbol.
All information has been collected. Thank you!
